---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['feature', 'triage']
assignees: []
---

## The Problem
What user problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see happen. Mockups / sketches welcome.

## Alternatives Considered
What other ways could this be solved? Why is your proposal better?

## Scope
- Estimated complexity: [S / M / L / XL]
- Affected areas: [chat / live / mesh / calls / stories / channels / settings / auth / other]
- Breaking change? [yes / no]

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] Just suggesting for now

## Additional Context
Anything else?
